outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Iran war — US rescues F-15 airman; Trump threatens Tehran over Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: CNN leads with F-15E WSO rescue and Trump's Easter profanity-laden Hormuz threat. Analysis piece on Israeli solidarity coming under strain.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump unleashes curse-filled social media rant at Iran after U.S. rescues colonel
outlets.summary: NPR focuses on Trump's profanity and threats, the F-15E rescue details, and Iran's rejection of the ultimatum.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: F-15E crew member rescued in Iran as Trump threatens 'all hell' on Iran over Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Fox leads with the dramatic rescue and Trump's strength projection. Opinion piece frames war as connected to US domestic security.

outlets.name: Fox News (Opinion)
outlets.headline: Iran war opens new front tied to U.S. domestic fraud and migration
outlets.summary: Opinion argues the Iran war is not a distraction from domestic issues but deeply connected to immigration and national security.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 37 of US-Israeli attacks?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera's comprehensive daily summary. Liveblog covers Iran rejecting Trump ultimatum, Kuwait oil complex fires, Lebanon 14 killed.

outlets.name: Anadolu Agency
outlets.headline: Houthis announce targeting Ben Gurion Airport, military targets in southern Israel
outlets.summary: Turkish state agency leads with Houthi-IRGC-Hezbollah joint operation claim against Ben Gurion.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Hours after Haifa missile strike, search continues for 4 feared buried under wreckage
outlets.summary: Times leads with the Haifa residential building strike and rescue efforts. 82-year-old man in serious condition.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Three Still Missing After Iranian Missile Hits Building in Haifa, 24 Wounded
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports on Haifa strike with focus on missing civilians. Ongoing coverage of declining Israeli public support for the war.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran military rejects Trump's 'helpless, nervous' ultimatum — warns 'gates of hell will open'
outlets.summary: Press TV leads with Iran's defiant rejection of Trump's 48-hour deadline. Claims successful engagement of US rescue aircraft.

outlets.name: Tasnim News
outlets.headline: IRGC claims downing of US C-130 and 2 Black Hawks during rescue operation
outlets.summary: Tasnim leads with IRGC claims of downing US aircraft. State TV broadcast wreckage footage. US has not confirmed these claims.
